title: AgentSession
description: A single autonomous agent session. Tracks the role, mode, execution substrate, bound skills and memories, and all execution decisions made during the session.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

parentSessionRef.description: URN of the parent session if this is a sub-session (e.g. an explorer launched by a main session). Null for root sessions.

role.description: The functional role this session plays: main (top-level coordinator), explorer (research), planner, executor, reviewer, auditor, reverser (undo), or custom.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the session: created → waiting → running → paused → completed/failed/canceled/merged/reversed.

mode.description: The current operating mode: plan (design only), ask (gather information), execute (make changes), or review (assess results).

workspaceRef.description: Identifier of the workspace (repository, project, or environment) this session operates in.

worktreeRef.description: Optional reference to a git worktree if the session works in an isolated branch checkout.

substrate.description: Where the agent runtime is hosted: local (developer machine), remote-local (remote dev), cloud, background (async), event-pushed, or ci (CI pipeline).

surface.description: The execution surface constraints (sandbox mode, network policy, protected paths) applied to this session.

provider.description: Optional name of the AI model provider or runtime host.

skillRefs.description: URNs of the SkillManifests available to this session.

memoryRefs.description: URNs of the MemoryEntries loaded into this session.

transcriptRef.description: Optional URN of the conversation transcript artifact.

decisionRefs.description: URNs of all ExecutionDecisions recorded during this session.

telemetryRefs.description: URNs of TelemetryEvents emitted during this session.

time.description: Session timing: startedAt (required) and optional endedAt.
